title: Grand Theft Auto 6
text: No casualties were reported from an incident at Rockstar North The union accused Rockstar of spying on employees' private communications An AI-generated video claiming to show off impressive GTA 6 graphics in action went viral this week Rockstar's long-awaited blockbuster is proving an irresistible target for viral slop merchants As exclusives continue to appear on other platforms, what role will consoles play? The IWGB is moving forward with legal claims over allegations of union-busting Rockstar has been accused of union-busting after firing dozens of workers GTA6 was six months away this morning, and now were waiting another year Rockstar's blockbuster is now more than a year away from its original target A labor group claims Rockstar Games is union busting Rockstar Games says they were fired for 'gross misconduct' The move comes during a Counter-Strike economic crash and ahead of Grand Theft Auto 6 The content maker was 'sick and tired' of waiting for new information about the upcoming open world game
